name: Spam Vegetable Strudel
recipeIngredient: 1 package Long-grain and wild rice mix (6.25 oz)
1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cut into thin strips (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Prepare rice according to package directions.
3. In a small saucepan, combine carrots, red pepper, and orange juice. Bring to a boil. Cover and cook for 5-7 minutes or until crisp-tender. Drain well.
4. Place the vegetables in a medium bowl.
5. In a large skillet, sauté SPAM, mushrooms, and green onion until tender.
6. Add the cooked meat mixture, rice, mustard, basil, and pepper to the vegetable mixture; stir well.
7. Place one sheet of phyllo pastry on a damp towel (keep remaining phyllo covered).
8. Lightly coat the phyllo with cooking spray.
9. Layer the remaining 5 sheets of phyllo pastry on top, lightly coating each sheet with cooking spray.
10. Spoon the meat mixture lengthwise down the center of the phyllo stack, leaving a half-inch border.
11. Roll the phyllo jelly-roll style, starting with the long side containing the meat mixture.
12. Tuck the ends under and place diagonally, seam side down, on a baking sheet coated with cooking spray.
13. Lightly coat the top of the pastry with cooking spray and sprinkle with bread crumbs.
14. Make 12 diagonal slits across the top of the pastry using a sharp knife.
15. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden. Serve with soy sauce.
